I'm practicing TOEIC speaking Questions 3–4: Describe a picture. This is an example question:
"Directions: In this part of the test, you will describe the picture on your screen in as much detail as you can. You will have 45 seconds to prepare your response. Then you will have 30 seconds to speak about the picture."
please create its description with this structure:
"Địa điểm: This picture was taken in...
Số lượng người: There are ... people in the picture
(If have) Miêu tả đặc điểm chung của nhân vật
[vị trí], a man/a woman/a boy + + with + mô tả ngoại hình + is + V-ing
Mô tả bên cạnh, phía sau background: Next to her, I can see... In the background, there is...
Cảm giác: It seems that they are very busy... Maybe they are clearing their room."
Describe the image in detail.
fully itemise the  contents of this photograph

what is this paper about? tell me more about accedent that described in this picture
find the pattern
As a robot assistant, identify the main object in the image and explain how it could be used or interacted with in a real-world task.
From a robot perception perspective, describe the visible object, its likely function, and any cues that would help a robot decide whether it can grasp or manipulate it.
As a service robot in a home or facility, identify the appliance or machine shown and explain what information is useful for interacting with it safely.
As a mobile robot or navigation system, count the visible cars and briefly describe their positions in the scene.
As an indoor service robot, describe the room layout and list the objects that would matter for navigation or task planning.
From a robot viewpoint, itemize the main visible objects in the scene and mention which ones may act as obstacles or useful landmarks.
As a navigation robot, locate the car in the image and describe its position relative to the rest of the scene.
As an inspection robot, identify the visible damaged parts of the car and output the key findings in a concise structured form.
Read any visible text, label, or sign in the image and explain how that information could help a robot decide its next action.
As an outdoor inspection robot, identify the device or object in the scene and explain what safety or navigation considerations it may imply.
